page.title: [XX-Investments-XX]
page.subtitle: [XX-Track your investment portfolio-XX]
page.autoGeneratedSymbolNote: [XX-* Auto-generated symbol name. Could not find in Yahoo dataset.-XX]

portfolioSummary.title: [XX-Portfolio Summary-XX]
portfolioSummary.holdingsValueTooltip: [XX-The current market value of all securities you hold, based on the latest available prices.-XX]
portfolioSummary.cashBalanceTooltip: [XX-Uninvested cash sitting in your investment accounts, available for purchasing securities.-XX]
portfolioSummary.totalGainTooltip: [XX-The total profit or loss across all your investments: Portfolio Value minus Net Invested. Includes realized gains, unrealized gains, dividends, and interest.-XX]
portfolioSummary.netInvestedTooltip: [XX-The net amount of your own money deposited into your investment accounts. This is total contributions minus withdrawals, excluding any investment gains, dividends, or interest earned.-XX]
portfolioSummary.costBasisTooltip: [XX-The total amount you originally paid to acquire your investments, including purchase prices and transaction fees. Used to calculate your gains and losses.-XX]
portfolioSummary.gainLossTooltip: [XX-Unrealized gain or loss on your current holdings: Market Value minus Cost Basis. Does not include realized gains from past sales or income received.-XX]
portfolioSummary.simpleReturnTooltip: [XX-Total percentage gain or loss on your holdings, calculated as (Market Value − Cost Basis) ÷ Cost Basis. Does not account for the timing of contributions or withdrawals.-XX]
portfolioSummary.twrTooltip: [XX-Measures how well your investments performed regardless of when you added or removed money. Eliminates the impact of cash flow timing to show pure investment performance.-XX]
portfolioSummary.cagrTooltip: [XX-Compound Annual Growth Rate. Your annualized return based on Net Invested vs. current portfolio value, as if growth had been perfectly steady each year.-XX]

groupedHoldings.title: [XX-Holdings by Account-XX]
groupedHoldings.symbolClickTitle: [XX-Click to filter transactions by this symbol-XX]

investmentValueChart.title: [XX-Portfolio Value Over Time-XX]
investmentValueChart.intradayUnavailableTitle: [XX-Intraday view unavailable for this account mix-XX]
investmentValueChart.intradayUnavailableDescription: [XX-One or more holdings use a quote provider (MSN Money) that does not expose intraday data. Switch to a longer range to see daily snapshots.-XX]

transactionList.title: [XX-Recent Transactions-XX]
transactionList.deleteConfirmMessage: [XX-Are you sure you want to delete this {action} transaction{security}?-XX]
transactionList.deleteConfirmGeneric: [XX-Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?-XX]

transactionForm.noSplitRatioWarning: [XX-No split ratio is set on this transaction. Enter the ratio as it was announced before saving — Monize won't assume one for you.-XX]
transactionForm.splitRatioHelp: [XX-Enter the ratio as it was announced. For a 2-for-1 split use 2 new and 1 old; for a 1-for-2 reverse split use 1 new and 2 old. Effective ratio:-XX]
transactionForm.newPriceAfterSplit: [XX-New price per share, after split ({currency}, optional)-XX]
transactionForm.holdingPreviewCostBasisNote: [XX-Total cost basis is preserved across the split.-XX]
transactionForm.noSharesOnDate: [XX-No shares of this security were held in this account on {date}; the split will be recorded but won't change holdings until shares are added on or before that date.-XX]
transactionForm.transferCostNote: [XX-The cost per share (prefilled from the source account) is carried to the destination so your gain and profit reports stay correct. This moves shares only -- no cash changes hands.-XX]
transactionForm.conversionHelp: [XX-Adjust the rate or the converted total to match the amount actually posted to your cash account.-XX]
transactionForm.toastSameAccount: [XX-Source and destination accounts must be different-XX]
transactionForm.toastSplitRatioRequired: [XX-Split ratio must be greater than zero-XX]
transactionForm.toastPairedLegError: [XX-Could not load the paired transfer leg; reopen and try again-XX]
